description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: At the same time that no new SKY tokens are issued, SKY tokens are bought back and burned on a regular basis, using a portion of the Net Revenue of the Protocol as dictated by the Treasury Management Function. See [A.2.
.1.2.5.1 - Smart Burn Buffer](c2a0ca01-ffea-46ee-8077-e46e0510d097). As a result, the total supply of SKY tokens will continue to decrease over time.
